eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED WEEKLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Churchill; Clark; Douglas; Elko; Esmeralda; Eureka; Humboldt; Lander; Lincoln; Lyon; Mineral; Nye; Pershing; Storey; Washoe; White Pine; Carson City, NV; at 11:13 AM ON MAY 8, 2026 Effective until 12:13 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This is a test of the Emergency Alert System conducted by Nevada Office of Emergency Management.  This is only a test.  No action is required
